overall.description: First-person exploration of a sunlit Mediterranean waterfront in a video game. The player walks along a paved dock lined with historic European buildings, passes a large tree, and turns to face the open harbor and distant hills. The scene is devoid of pedestrians and vehicles, emphasizing the architectural details and coastal atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with historic Mediterranean buildings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront promenade beside historic European-style buildings

entered.detail: three-story Mediterranean building with shuttered windows and stucco facade
tall red-brick historic building with multiple windows and stone trim
calm blue water of the harbor extending to the horizon
hazy mountains visible across the water in the background

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit waterfront promenade with Mediterranean architecture. The camera moves forward along the paved dock, passing a beige stucco building and approaching a larger red brick structure, with the calm harbor water visible to the right.

events.description: passing the large acacia tree on the left side of the promenade

agents.ego_description: continuing along the waterfront promenade, passing a distinctive flat-topped tree and approaching an open plaza area

entered.detail: mature tree with wide spreading canopy and flat-topped foliage
white stone building with arched windows and classical architectural details
smaller two-story building with yellow facade
low industrial building with green roof and large shuttered doors

segments.scene_description: The walk continues past a large acacia tree that dominates the left side of the frame. The red brick building draws closer while a white historic building and yellow structure come into view further ahead. A green industrial warehouse appears on the right as the promenade opens into a wider plaza area.

scene_state.functional_zone: open dock area facing the harbor

events.description: turning right to face the open water and distant shoreline

agents.ego_description: turning toward the water to look out across the harbor at the distant hills and shoreline buildings

entered.detail: cluster of buildings visible across the water on the distant shore
green forested hills rising behind the distant shoreline

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right to face the open harbor, leaving the buildings behind. The view opens to reveal the expanse of water with a distant shoreline featuring scattered buildings and forested hills under the bright midday sun.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a sunlit Mediterranean promenade that gradually opens from a narrow architectural corridor into a wide harbor vista. It begins by moving forward along a paved dock, passing a beige stucco building and approaching a red brick structure with calm harbor water shimmering to the right. As the camera continues, the view is momentarily framed by a large acacia tree on the left before the path expands into a wider plaza flanked by white and yellow historic buildings and a green industrial warehouse. The scene then shifts as the camera turns right, leaving the buildings behind to face the open expanse of the harbor. Finally, the perspective reveals a distant shoreline of scattered buildings and forested hills under the bright midday sun.
